arts.ttl: Real Madrid Predicted Lineup vs. Real Sociedad: La Liga
arts.sum: There may be no silverware to display at the Santiago Bernabéu on Saturday afternoon, but there’s bound to be a celebration of some sorts following Real Madrid’s final game of the 2024–25 season. CB: Raúl Asencio— Asencio is an injury doubt heading into the game, but the Spanish centre-back is expected to be fit to line up on the final day.

arts.ttl: Official: Real Madrid name final squad of season to face Real Sociedad
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have on Friday unveiled the club’s final matchday squad of the campaign. This, of course, comes ahead of the upcoming gameweek 38 round of fixtures…
